title: Todo See Less Training Specification
summary: Implemented a model-backed todo feedback loop that lets users mark a todo as something to see less often, records durable negative relevance memory, and feeds that memory into future todo intelligence decisions.
next_action: Ready for review in the todo-see-less-training worktree.
